arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَالذَّارِيَاتِ ذَرْوًا
english translation text:
By the scattering [winds] that scatter [the clouds];
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَالْحَامِلَاتِ وِقْرًا
english translation text:
by the [rain] bearing [clouds] laden [with water];
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَالْجَارِيَاتِ يُسْرًا
english translation text:
by [the ships] which move gently [on the sea];
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَالْمُقَسِّمَاتِ أَمْرًا
english translation text:
by [the angels] who dispense [livelihood] by [His] command:
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
english translation text:
indeed what you are promised is true,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَإِنَّ الدِّينَ لَوَاقِعٌ
english translation text:
and indeed the retribution will surely come to pass!
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَالسَّمَاءِ ذَاتِ الْحُبُكِ
english translation text:
By the sky full of adornment [with stars],
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِي قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
english translation text:
indeed you are of different opinions!
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
english translation text:
He who has been turned away [from the truth] is turned away from it.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: قُتِلَ الْخَرَّاصُونَ
english translation text:
Perish the liars,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: الَّذِينَ هُمْ فِي غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
english translation text:
who are heedless in a stupor!
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: يَسْأَلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ الدِّينِ
english translation text:
They ask, ‘When will be the Day of Retribution?’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى النَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
english translation text:
It is the day when they will be tormented in the Fire,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: ذُوقُوا فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَٰذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
english translation text:
[and will be told]: ‘Taste your torment. This is what you used to hasten.’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
Indeed the Godwary will be amid gardens and springs,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: آخِذِينَ مَا آتَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
english translation text:
receiving what their Lord has given them, for they had been virtuous aforetime.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: كَانُوا قَلِيلًا مِّنَ اللَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
english translation text:
They used to sleep a little during the night,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَبِالْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
english translation text:
and at dawns they would plead for forgiveness,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي أَمْوَالِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّائِلِ وَالْمَحْرُومِ
english translation text:
and there was a share in their wealth for the beggar and the deprived.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي الْأَرْضِ آيَاتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
english translation text:
In the earth are signs for those who have conviction,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
english translation text:
and in your souls [as well]. Will you not then perceive?
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي السَّمَاءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
english translation text:
And in the sky is your provision and what you are promised.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَا أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
english translation text:
By the Lord of the sky and the earth, it is indeed the truth, just as [it is a fact that] you speak.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: هَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الْمُكْرَمِينَ
english translation text:
Did you receive the story of Abraham’s honoured guests?
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: إِذْ دَخَلُوا عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا سَلَامًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَامٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
english translation text:
When they entered into his presence, they said, ‘Peace!’ ‘Peace!’ He answered, ‘[You are] an unfamiliar folk.’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰ أَهْلِهِ فَجَاءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
english translation text:
Then he retired to his family and brought a fat [roasted] calf,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَقَرَّبَهُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
english translation text:
and put it near them. He said, ‘Will you not eat?’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَامٍ عَلِيمٍ
english translation text:
Then he felt a fear of them. They said, ‘Do not be afraid!’ and they gave him the good news of a wise son.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَأَقْبَلَتِ امْرَأَتُهُ فِي صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
english translation text:
Then his wife came forward crying [with joy]. She beat her face, and said, ‘A barren old woman!’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: قَالُوا كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ
english translation text:
They said, ‘So has your Lord said. Indeed He is the All-wise, the All-knowing.’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O messengers, what is now your errand?’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنَّا أُرْسِلْنَا إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We have been sent toward a guilty people,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
english translation text:
that We may rain upon them stones of clay,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
english translation text:
sent for the transgressors from your Lord.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
So We picked out those who were in it of the faithful,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
english translation text:
but We did not find there other than one house of Muslims,
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَا آيَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ الْعَذَابَ الْأَلِيمَ
english translation text:
and We have left therein a sign for those who fear a painful punishment.’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي مُوسَىٰ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَاهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
And in Moses [too there is a sign] when We sent him to Pharaoh with a manifest authority.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِ وَقَالَ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
english translation text:
But he turned away assured of his might, and said, ‘A magician or a crazy man!’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَأَخَذْنَاهُ وَجُنُودَهُ فَنَبَذْنَاهُمْ فِي الْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
english translation text:
So We seized him and his hosts, and cast them into the sea, while he was blameworthy.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ الرِّيحَ الْعَقِيمَ
english translation text:
And in ‘Ad when We unleashed upon them a barren wind.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَيْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَالرَّمِيمِ
english translation text:
It left nothing that it came upon without making it like decayed bones.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَفِي ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
english translation text:
And in Thamud, when they were told, ‘Enjoy for a while.’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَعَتَوْا عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّاعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
english translation text:
Then they defied the command of their Lord; so the thunderbolt seized them as they looked on.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا مُنتَصِرِينَ
english translation text:
So they were neither able to rise up, nor to come to one another’s aid.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا قَوْمًا فَاسِقِينَ
english translation text:
And the people of Noah aforetime. Indeed, they were a transgressing lot.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَالسَّمَاءَ بَنَيْنَاهَا بِأَيْدٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
english translation text:
We have built the heaven with might, and indeed it is We who are its expanders.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَالْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَاهَا فَنِعْمَ الْمَاهِدُونَ
english translation text:
And We have spread out the earth, so how excellent spreaders We have been!
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
english translation text:
In all things We have created pairs so that you may take admonition.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَفِرُّوا إِلَى اللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
‘So flee toward Allah. Indeed, I am from Him a manifest warner to you.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ ۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
Do not set up another god besides Allah. Indeed I am from Him a manifest warner to you.’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ مَا أَتَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
english translation text:
So it was that there did not come any apostle to those who were before them but they said, ‘A magician,’ or ‘A crazy man!’
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: أَتَوَاصَوْا بِهِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
english translation text:
Did they enjoin this upon one another?! Rather, they were a rebellious lot.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَا أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
english translation text:
So turn away from them, as you will not be blameworthy.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
And admonish, for admonition indeed benefits the faithful.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
english translation text:
I did not create the jinn and the humans except that they may worship Me.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: مَا أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَا أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
english translation text:
I desire no provision from them, nor do I desire that they should feed Me.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ ذُو الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينُ
english translation text:
Indeed it is Allah who is the All-provider, Powerful and All-strong.
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَابِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
english translation text:
Indeed the lot of those who do wrong [now] will be like the lot of their [earlier] counterparts. So let them not ask Me to hasten on [that fate].
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds

arabic text: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِن يَوْمِهِمُ الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
english translation text:
Woe to the faithless for the day they are promised!
Adh Dhariyat – The Winnowing Winds
